normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU2_contiguous_witness (arr : Arr) (hne : arr ≠ []) :
  ∃ i j : Nat,
    i ≤ j ∧ j ≤ arr.length ∧ i < j ∧ sliceSum arr i j = maxSubarray arr
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: For every non-empty input, some contiguous non-empty subslice achieves the returned maximum sum.

normalized_obligations.lean_statement:
theorem SU3_global_upper_bound (arr : Arr) (i j : Nat) (hne : arr ≠ [])
  (hij : i < j) (hj : j ≤ arr.length) :
  sliceSum arr i j ≤ maxSubarray arr
normalized_obligations.nl_gloss: No contiguous non-empty subslice sums above the returned maximum.
